title: ALP Swarm
description: Defines a pool of specialized agents that collaborate on a project concurrently.

id.description: Unique kebab-case identifier for this swarm.

description.description: Human-readable description of the swarm's purpose.

agents.description: References to @agent objects in this swarm.

max_concurrent.description: Maximum number of tasks that can run in parallel in this swarm.

strategy.description: The task-assignment strategy for the swarm scheduler.
